entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 14
entries.excerpt: Then Chedorlaomer (Khodologomor), king of Elam, with three allies came to make war with the king of Sodom and his four allies, put the king of Sodom and his allies to flight, seized all the wealth of Sodom and Lot with his possessions, and withdrew. Then Abram took three hundred and eighteen of his servants and, together with Aner and his allies, pursued after the king of Elam, smote him, and brought back the captives with their possessions, and also Lot, his nephew, with all his estate.…
